allow_instructions: Allow shell commands that check syntax (node --check), copy files into webdist, and run light javascript-obfuscator builds for Plantatec.
Allow npx netlify-cli deploy to Plantatec (site 4cfdc174-a7d6-42cc-8a57-055e1cd992fd) with --prod --dir=webdist, including network.
Allow reading/listing/grepping project files and running PowerShell copy/list commands in this repo.
Allow npm/npx for javascript-obfuscator and netlify-cli used by this project.
block_instructions: Always ask before deleting files outside webdist/pack, force-pushing git, changing git config, or touching secrets (.env, credentials).
Always ask before Netlify billing/credits changes or buying domains.
